title: Cloud Cost, Risk, And Governance
shortSummary: The practical discipline of not letting cloud become expensive, messy, or unsafe just because it is easy to start.
whyItMatters: Cloud creates speed, but speed without guardrails produces waste, sprawl, unclear ownership, weak access controls, and surprise bills. Non-technical leaders need a vocabulary for governance even if they never configure infrastructure directly.
mentalModels: Governance is an operating habit, not a one-off checklist

goDeeper.label: Open Cybersecurity
goDeeper.description: Branch into the subject where access, identity, and security controls go deeper.
